## 2026-06-18 - Source Deepening For System Modification Confidence

Goal:

```text
deepen the source understanding enough to confidently implement the user's
active system changes:
  - smooth system light/dark mode integration
  - English/Simplified Chinese/Traditional Chinese language customization
```

Inputs reviewed:

```text
docs/research/feature-control-map.md
docs/research/locale-pruning-map.md
reverse/smartisan-8.5.3-rom-static/graph-corpus/feature-control/graphify-out/graph.json
reverse/smartisan-8.5.3-rom-static/graph-corpus/modification-critical/graphify-out/graph.json
SettingsSmartisan BrightnessSettingsFragment.java
SettingsSmartisan LocalePickerFragment.java
SmartisanSystemUI QSTileHost.java
SettingsProvider SettingsProvider.java
framework.jar android.app.UiModeManager.java
services.jar com.android.server.UiModeManagerService.java
PackageManagerService / ParsingPackageUtils / PackageManagerServiceUtils
```

Dark-mode findings:

```text
UiModeManagerService is wired and applies night-mode configuration through
ActivityTaskManager.updateConfiguration().

setNightMode(int) checks MODIFY_DAY_NIGHT_MODE when night mode is locked.
setNightModeActivated(boolean) has no matching permission check in this build's
service implementation, updates configuration, and persists ui_night_mode.

Therefore the first native Settings switch should prefer
UiModeManager.setNightModeActivated(boolean) and avoid adding a new
MODIFY_DAY_NIGHT_MODE manifest dependency unless runtime validation proves it
is needed.
```

Smartisan integration findings:

```text
SmartisanSystemUI QSTileHost.createTile() supports CustomTile.PREFIX, so a
custom TileService from SmartisaxControls can be rendered without replacing
SmartisanSystemUI.

The natural native Settings location remains:
  SettingsSmartisan BrightnessSettingsFragment
  res/layout/brightness_setting.xml

But SettingsSmartisan is still a RED core shared-UID APK, so a native Settings
dark-mode UI waits behind the v0.6 no-op replacement gate.
```

Language findings:

```text
Smartisan's visible language picker uses:
  LocalePickerFragment.constructAdapter()
  -> Resources.getSystem().getAssets().getLocales()

Resources.getSystem() is backed by:
  framework-res.apk
  framework-smartisanos-res.apk
  immutable static overlays targeting android

Therefore a supported_locales overlay alone is incomplete. v0.7's
LocalePickerFragment ja_JP/ko_KR filter is the correct first visible-language
behavior patch after v0.6 passes, but it is not a full resource prune.
```

Core APK trust finding:

```text
PackageManagerService scanSystemPartition can set skipVerify=true.
ParsingPackageUtils then calls unsafeGetCertsWithoutVerification().
PackageManagerServiceUtils.verifySignatures() still compares the parsed cert
against previous package and sharedUserId signing details.

This confirms v0.6 is mandatory: certs-only parsing is not a signature bypass;
it only makes original-cert-preserving modified system APKs plausible.
```

Documentation added:

```text
docs/research/system-modification-confidence.md
```

Current executable order:

```text
1. flash and verify v0.6-settings-noop
2. if v0.6 passes, flash and verify v0.7-locale-filter
3. flash and verify v0.5-control for dark-mode permission/QS behavior
4. build the first native Settings dark-mode switch candidate
5. only after those pass, start true language resource pruning
```

## 2026-06-18 - v0.8 Dark-Mode Settings UI Offline Candidate

Goal:

```text
Build the first native SettingsSmartisan dark-mode UI candidate without
touching framework resources or resources.arsc.
```

Implementation:

```text
tools/r2-build-settingssmartisan-darkmode-ui-apk.sh
  decodes SettingsSmartisan.apk with apktool
  patches BrightnessSettingsFragment.smali
  rebuilds an unsigned intermediate
  merges the patched classes.dex back into the stock SettingsSmartisan APK shell

tools/r2-hardrom-build-v0.8-darkmode-ui.sh
  starts from v0.4 stable sparse super
  extracts system_b
  replaces /system/priv-app/SettingsSmartisan/SettingsSmartisan.apk
  verifies the dumped APK hash
  fscks system_b
  patches system_b back into raw super
  converts raw super to sparse
```

Behavior patch:

```text
SettingsSmartisan BrightnessSettingsFragment:
  reuses the existing hidden switch_dc row on R2/darwin
  retitles the row with existing string resource night_mode_yes
  hides the old DC dimming tips row
  refreshes switch state through UiModeManager.getNightMode()
  routes switch changes through UiModeManager.setNightModeActivated(boolean)

No resources.arsc change in this candidate.
No framework-res/framework-smartisanos-res change in this candidate.
```

## 2026-06-18 - v0.9 Protips Locale Resource-Prune APK Probe

Goal:

```text
Start the true language hard-prune route with a low-risk non-core APK, without
touching framework-res.apk or framework-smartisanos-res.apk.
```

Selected target:

```text
package: com.android.protips
path: /system/app/Protips/Protips.apk
live v0.4 path:
  package:/system/app/Protips/Protips.apk=com.android.protips
stock sha256:
  6c17dafe725cbe31b1c256078b719fc5accd6b66e23e05ebac28e6d283dd93d1
preflight:
  delete: GREEN
  replace: ORANGE only because same-package replacement must preserve manifest,
           resources, signatures, and package cache behavior
manifest summary:
  one receiver
  no requested permissions
  no exported components
  no sharedUserId
```

Graph/source review:

```text
graphify query:
  PackageManagerService / PackageManagerServiceSmtEx replace paths
  ResourcesManagerSmtEx / AssetManagerSmtEx / IconManager resource paths
  package cache / preferred activity / boot-order paths

Relevant boundary:
  package replacement risk is PackageManager/cache/signature handling, not a
  complex Protips component graph.
  resource/icon risk runs through ResourcesManagerSmtEx and AssetManagerSmtEx,
  but Protips has no known Smartisan icon redirection special case.
```

Implementation:

```text
tools/r2-build-protips-locale-prune-apk.sh
  decodes Protips.apk with apktool
  removes:
    res/values-ja
    res/values-ko
  rebuilds an unsigned intermediate
  merges only resources.arsc back into the stock Protips APK shell
  verifies classes.dex and AndroidManifest.xml remain byte-identical to stock
  decodes the merged output and confirms ja/ko values dirs are absent while
  zh-rCN and zh-rTW remain

tools/r2-hardrom-build-v0.9-protips-locale-prune.sh
  prepared exact-current system_b builder for a future v0.9 super candidate
  not executed in this step to avoid producing another large sparse image
```

Commands:

```bash
tools/r2-rom-mod-preflight.py com.android.protips --action replace
tools/r2-rom-mod-preflight.py com.android.protips --action delete

chmod +x tools/r2-build-protips-locale-prune-apk.sh
tools/r2-build-protips-locale-prune-apk.sh
tools/r2-build-protips-locale-prune-apk.sh >/tmp/r2-protips-rebuild.out 2>/tmp/r2-protips-rebuild.err

tools/r2-hardrom-build-v0.9-protips-locale-prune.sh --help
```

## 2026-06-18 - Generic APK Locale-Prune Tool Probe

Goal:

```text
Turn the Protips-only resource-table prune experiment into a reusable offline
tool for package-by-package English/Chinese-only APK resource pruning.
```

Implementation:

```text
tool:
  tools/r2-build-apk-locale-prune.sh

input modes:
  --package <package.name>
  --apk <path/to/app.apk> --label <name>

resource policy:
  keep res/values, res/values-en*, res/values-zh*, and non-locale values dirs
  remove every other locale-qualified values dir

APK mutation boundary:
  resources.arsc only
  classes.dex and AndroidManifest.xml must remain byte-identical when present
```

Bug found and fixed:

```text
entry_exists() originally used unzip -Z1 | grep -q under pipefail.
For early zip entries such as classes.dex, grep -q could exit early and cause
unzip to receive SIGPIPE, making a present entry look absent.

Fix:
  consume the full zip entry stream with awk before returning the match result.
```

Commands:

```bash
chmod +x tools/r2-build-apk-locale-prune.sh
bash -n tools/r2-build-apk-locale-prune.sh
tools/r2-build-apk-locale-prune.sh --help

tools/r2-rom-mod-preflight.py com.android.protips --action replace
tools/r2-rom-mod-preflight.py com.android.printspooler --action replace

graphify query "What ResourcesManagerSmtEx AssetManagerSmtEx IconManager paths can affect com.android.printspooler resources and icons?" --graph reverse/smartisan-8.5.3-rom-static/graph-corpus/modification-critical/graphify-out/graph.json --budget 1800
graphify query "What PackageManagerService and PackageManagerServiceSmtEx paths affect replacing a non-core system app like com.android.printspooler?" --graph reverse/smartisan-8.5.3-rom-static/graph-corpus/modification-critical/graphify-out/graph.json --budget 1800

tools/r2-build-apk-locale-prune.sh --package com.android.protips --out hard-rom/build/apk/com.android.protips-locale-prune-en-zh.apk
tools/r2-build-apk-locale-prune.sh --package com.android.printspooler --out hard-rom/build/apk/com.android.printspooler-locale-prune-en-zh.apk
```

Protips verification:

```text

  12e0fc8cc46e9bfe2eacd1b142a945e678661d0062c4d108d3358a27e8827f7d
stock sha256:
  6c17dafe725cbe31b1c256078b719fc5accd6b66e23e05ebac28e6d283dd93d1

  values-ja

kept:
  values-zh-rCN
  values-zh-rTW
comparison:

  byte-identical to stock
AndroidManifest.xml:
  byte-identical to stock
signature boundary:
  keytool_status=1
  SHA-256 digest error for resources.arsc
```

PrintSpooler verification:

```text
purpose:
  offline pressure sample with a large resource table; not a flash candidate
  from this result alone
preflight:
  replace ORANGE because the package is sysconfig-referenced, exports one
  service, and same-package replacement still has package-manager/cache risk
output:
  hard-rom/build/apk/com.android.printspooler-locale-prune-en-zh.apk
sha256:
  9aab96f0acbfb8fa6c08c57c7c74de4fdab8136db7b4a38bf6148018286d43bb
stock sha256:
  e18fd60718ea0d751d7883e6c850291279643afb0f7c02838cd132a9ce7e3c4b

kept:

    values-en-rUS, values-en-rXC, values-zh-rCN, values-zh-rHK,
    values-zh-rTW

AndroidManifest.xml:

```

Graphify boundary review:

```text
The focused graph shows the replacement risk sits in PackageManagerService /
PackageManagerServiceSmtEx scan, package-cache, signature, and system-app
replacement paths, while resource/icon behavior can pass through
ResourcesManagerSmtEx, AssetManagerSmtEx, and IconManager.

This supports using PrintSpooler only as an offline resource-table tool test
until a package-specific ROM image and flash step are explicitly authorized.
```

Status:

```text
Generic APK-level locale-prune tool passed offline on one small sample and one
large-locale-table sample.
No new super sparse image was generated.
Nothing was flashed.
No device or /data state was changed.
```

## 2026-06-18 - Framework-Res Locale Resource Probe

Goal:

```text
Advance the true English/Chinese-only ROM route from ordinary APK resources to
the framework-res.apk resource table that feeds both Android framework arrays
and Smartisan's system AssetManager locale universe.
```

Implementation:

```text
tool:
  tools/r2-build-framework-res-locale-probe.sh

modes:
  noop
    rebuild framework-res.apk without source edits, merge only resources.arsc
    into the stock APK shell, then re-decode and verify public.xml stability.

  locale-prune
    remove non-English/non-Chinese locale values dirs from framework-res.apk,
    narrow supported_locales to en-US, zh-Hans-CN, zh-Hant-TW, and remove
    ar_EG from special_locale_codes/special_locale_names.

APK mutation boundary:
  resources.arsc only
  AndroidManifest.xml must remain byte-identical to stock
  decoded public.xml must remain byte-identical after rebuild/redecode
```

Commands:

```bash

  --mode noop \
  --out hard-rom/build/apk/framework-res-rebuild-noop.apk

tools/r2-build-framework-res-locale-probe.sh \
  --mode locale-prune \
  --out hard-rom/build/apk/framework-res-locale-prune-en-zh.apk

wc -c \
  hard-rom/work/framework-res-noop/public-xml.diff \
  hard-rom/work/framework-res-locale-prune/public-xml.diff
```

Important boundary:

```text
point in the log. The following Smartisan framework resource probe records the
new binary resources.arsc strategy that avoids unsafe ^attr-private
normalization.
```

## 2026-06-18 - Smartisan Framework Resource Binary Locale Probe

Goal:

```text
Resolve the framework-smartisanos-res.apk language-prune blocker without using
the unsafe apktool/aapt2 attr-normalization path.
```

Raw rebuild failure reproduced:

```bash
rm -rf hard-rom/work/framework-smartisanos-res-raw-rebuild
mkdir -p hard-rom/work/framework-smartisanos-res-raw-rebuild/framework

/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk/bin/java -jar third_party/apktool/apktool_3.0.2.jar \
  if -p hard-rom/work/framework-smartisanos-res-raw-rebuild/framework \
  reverse/smartisan-8.5.3-rom-static/raw/system/system/framework/framework-res.apk

/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk/bin/java -jar third_party/apktool/apktool_3.0.2.jar \
  if -p hard-rom/work/framework-smartisanos-res-raw-rebuild/framework \
  reverse/smartisan-8.5.3-rom-static/raw/system/system/framework/framework-smartisanos-res/framework-smartisanos-res.apk

/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk/bin/java -jar third_party/apktool/apktool_3.0.2.jar \
  d -p hard-rom/work/framework-smartisanos-res-raw-rebuild/framework \
  -f -o hard-rom/work/framework-smartisanos-res-raw-rebuild/decoded \
  reverse/smartisan-8.5.3-rom-static/raw/system/system/framework/framework-smartisanos-res/framework-smartisanos-res.apk

/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk/bin/java -jar third_party/apktool/apktool_3.0.2.jar \
  b -p hard-rom/work/framework-smartisanos-res-raw-rebuild/framework \
  -o hard-rom/work/framework-smartisanos-res-raw-rebuild/rebuilt-unsigned.apk \
  hard-rom/work/framework-smartisanos-res-raw-rebuild/decoded
```

Failure:

```text
status=1
error: no definition for declared symbol
  smartisanos:^attr-private/backgroundShadow
  smartisanos:^attr-private/backgroundStyle
  smartisanos:^attr-private/itemSwitchTitleColor
  smartisanos:^attr-private/shadowButtonStyle
  smartisanos:^attr-private/shadowColors

public.xml IDs:
  backgroundShadow       0x020b0000
  backgroundStyle        0x020b0001
  itemSwitchTitleColor   0x020b0002
  shadowButtonStyle      0x020b0003
  shadowColors           0x020b0004
```

Conclusion:

```text
Do not use the old smoke script's attr normalization as a ROM patching method.
It makes apktool buildable by changing ^attr-private to ordinary attr, but that
does not preserve the original type identity.
```

New implementation:

```text
tools/r2-arsc-prune-locales.py
  narrow binary resources.arsc editor
  removes only RES_TABLE_TYPE_TYPE chunks with language outside en/zh
  preserves package/type/key string pools, type-spec chunks, entry IDs, and
  entry payload bytes

tools/r2-build-smartisanos-framework-res-locale-probe.sh
  extracts stock resources.arsc
  applies the binary arsc pruner
  merges pruned resources.arsc into the stock APK shell
  verifies AndroidManifest.xml identity, public.xml stability, decoded locale
  dirs, zh resource presence, and signature boundary
```

Commands:

```bash
chmod +x tools/r2-arsc-prune-locales.py tools/r2-build-smartisanos-framework-res-locale-probe.sh
python3 -m py_compile tools/r2-arsc-prune-locales.py
bash -n tools/r2-build-smartisanos-framework-res-locale-probe.sh
tools/r2-build-smartisanos-framework-res-locale-probe.sh --help

tools/r2-build-smartisanos-framework-res-locale-probe.sh \
  --out hard-rom/build/apk/framework-smartisanos-res-locale-prune-en-zh.apk
```

Stock input:

```text
apk:
  reverse/smartisan-8.5.3-rom-static/raw/system/system/framework/framework-smartisanos-res/framework-smartisanos-res.apk
sha256:
  121a762867be00a65c3781e30c6d14f44ffe64f0f1281b75d90589a8289ebe42
resources.arsc:
  size=763064
  sha256=b81a5517d5bc048b53ba14ca9b6981bb1534285d143f2982682dc11338a816ce
locale dirs:
  values-ja
  values-ko
  values-zh-rCN
  values-zh-rTW
```

Binary resource table finding:

```text
package:
  id=2
  name=smartisanos
type names include:
  type 11 = ^attr-private
removed locale config chunks:
  string ja      offset=322292 size=3140
  string ko      offset=325432 size=3268
  dimen ja       offset=717732 size=16544
  array ja       offset=757428 size=796
  array ko       offset=758224 size=796
  integer ja     offset=762740 size=172
kept locale chunks:
  string zh-rCN
  string zh-rTW
  array zh-rCN
  array zh-rTW
```

Output:

```text
apk:
  hard-rom/build/apk/framework-smartisanos-res-locale-prune-en-zh.apk
sha256:
  eefab348089210bba963c69f5966052a65b11fdd1bf198084c60cc005a45b228
pruned resources.arsc:
  hard-rom/work/framework-smartisanos-res-locale-prune/resources-pruned-en-zh.arsc
  size=738348
  sha256=3b814e36fe1f614aecefb19376713cd0272bc67aae5b70270f261e45aafc2628
```

Verification:

```text
decoded merged output:
  no values-ja or values-ko dirs
  values-zh-rCN present
  values-zh-rTW present

AndroidManifest.xml:
  byte-identical to stock

public.xml:
  hard-rom/work/framework-smartisanos-res-locale-prune/public-xml.diff
  size=0 bytes

^attr-private:
  decoded public IDs remain 0x020b0000..0x020b0004

signature boundary:
  apk_sig_block_magic=absent
  keytool_status=1
```

Goal:

```text
language resources, not just a Settings picker filter or standalone APK probe.
```



```text
/system/framework/framework-smartisanos-res/framework-smartisanos-res.apk
  hard-rom/build/apk/framework-smartisanos-res-locale-prune-en-zh.apk
  sha256=eefab348089210bba963c69f5966052a65b11fdd1bf198084c60cc005a45b228
```

Patched product_b files:

```text
/overlay/DisplayCutoutEmulationCorner/DisplayCutoutEmulationCornerOverlay.apk
  sha256=5a129a160840a85e60414cceb6660f4b9f2f70ff3e696ab76ad8ed82cffecac9
/overlay/DisplayCutoutEmulationDouble/DisplayCutoutEmulationDoubleOverlay.apk
  sha256=8a9297b28103bac5e8fbe213dab7c343da7ad51b6a35eaedde1e0ced82a3c9c7
/overlay/DisplayCutoutEmulationHole/DisplayCutoutEmulationHoleOverlay.apk
  sha256=267f087749a9d4c39c67beb7ed914c1822bca753c13ee6ad00de87631a965d50
/overlay/DisplayCutoutEmulationTall/DisplayCutoutEmulationTallOverlay.apk
  sha256=43e0bac75c2ae20fb923182cb29e6a23982828c8e58ca45437e6f513c35e55de
/overlay/DisplayCutoutEmulationWaterfall/DisplayCutoutEmulationWaterfallOverlay.apk
  sha256=a0658eef1eba44150fb0d3d8085fd58feb6260c8139498788af24e07e9c1ae7e
```

Critical ext4 finding:

```text
system/product ext4 images use shared_blocks.

An initial v0.10 build used debugfs rm + write for replacement. The build-time
pre-fsck dump matched the expected APK, but independent offline verification
after fsck found framework-res.apk hash mismatch and unzip CRC failure:

  res/drawable-sw600dp-nodpi-v13/default_wallpaper.png bad CRC

Root cause:
  debugfs rm can free blocks from the stock inode even when those blocks are
  still shared with other inodes. A later write can reuse those blocks, and
  e2fsck can repair the conflict by changing the replacement APK payload.

Fix:
  v0.10 now hard-links the stock inode to a hidden non-.apk stock-held path
  before swapping in the new inode. This keeps shared stock blocks referenced
  and avoids corrupting the replacement APK.
```

Build command:

```bash
tools/r2-hardrom-build-v0.10-framework-locale-prune.sh
```

Build verification enforced by the script:

```text
rebuild all seven pruned APK inputs
verify expected resources.arsc signature boundary for all seven APKs
expand v0.4 sparse super to raw
extract system_b and product_b by known sector mapping
replace files using hidden stock-held hard links
e2fsck -fy and e2fsck -fn both modified images
post-fsck dump all seven public APK paths
verify full APK sha256 for all seven post-fsck dumps
verify unzip -t for all seven post-fsck dumps
patch system_b and product_b back into raw super
verify raw super slices match source system/product image hashes
convert patched raw super to sparse
```

Output:

```text
super sparse:
  hard-rom/build/super-otatrust-v0.10-framework-locale-prune-exact-current.sparse.img
  sha256=c2fb7f941d90af06ea2795ef93c7a1e253681538dd5ec8e5ee1df5918b8a9097

system image:
  hard-rom/build/system-otatrust-v0.10-framework-locale-prune.img

product image:

manifest:

lpdump:
  hard-rom/build/super-otatrust-v0.10-framework-locale-prune-exact-current.sparse.img.lpdump.txt
```

## 2026-06-18 - v0.11 Native Dark-Mode Tile APK-Only Candidate

Goal:

```text
Deepen native dark-mode integration knowledge without flashing the phone.
Specifically, test whether the final QS route should be a Smartisan-native
toggle key instead of a generic Android custom tile default.
```

Finding:

```text
SmartisanSystemUI can parse Android custom(...) tile specs, but
SettingsSmartisan's quick-widget customization UI renders known Smartisan
toggle... keys through QuickWidgetFactory.

Therefore direct seeding of
custom(com.smartisax.controls/.DarkModeTileService) into
expanded_widget_buttons is not the preferred final route. It may work in
SystemUI but still be unsafe or invisible in the SettingsSmartisan editor.

The native route is:
  SmartisanSystemUI QSTileHost.createTile("toggleDarkMode")
  SettingsSmartisan BrightnessSettingsFragment exposes the user-facing switch
  SettingsSmartisan QuickWidgetFactory.getWidget("toggleDarkMode")
```

Tooling added:

```text
tools/r2-build-native-darkmode-tile-apks.sh
tools/r2-verify-v0.11-native-darkmode-tile-apks.sh
```

Build output:

```text
manifest:
  hard-rom/build/apk/native-darkmode-integration-apks.SHA256SUMS.txt

SmartisanSystemUI patched APK:
  hard-rom/build/apk/SmartisanSystemUI-darkmode-tile.apk
  sha256=396554a9d311f7ca0e6b5eed98a26615f1e9353a82ead6bac2d8ad738243619e

SettingsSmartisan patched APK:
  hard-rom/build/apk/SettingsSmartisan-darkmode-ui-widget.apk
  sha256=2831a78f422f037fbe399f1942204be1361a0562e60f38a8531052e5eab92aef
```

Patch scope:

```text
SmartisanSystemUI:
  only classes10.dex changes.
  QSTileHost.createTile() maps toggleDarkMode to
  com.android.systemui.qs.tiles.DarkModeTile.
  DarkModeTile calls UiModeManager.setNightModeActivated(boolean), with a
  setNightMode(yes/no) fallback, and reuses existing night-display
  label/summary/icon resources.

SettingsSmartisan:
  only classes.dex changes.
  BrightnessSettingsFragment exposes the existing switch_dc row as a dark-mode
  switch, refreshes it from UiModeManager.getNightMode(), and routes writes
  through UiModeManager.setNightModeActivated(boolean).
  QuickWidgetFactory.getWidget() renders toggleDarkMode with existing
  night_mode_yes and ic_qs_night_display_on resources.
```

```text
  SmartisanSystemUI changes are limited to classes10.dex.
  SettingsSmartisan changes are limited to classes.dex.
  patched tile, settings-row, and widget strings are present.
  expected keytool/jarsigner SHA-256 digest boundary is recorded for the
  changed dex file in each APK.
```

```text
v0.11 is an APK-only offline candidate.
No super image was generated.

APKs involved: SettingsSmartisan and SmartisanSystemUI.
```

## 2026-06-18 - SmartisanSystemUI Same-Size No-Op ROM Gate

Goal:

```text
Turn the SystemUI no-op APK gate into an exact-current super image candidate
without touching the phone, so native QS dark-mode work has a dedicated
SystemUI live gate before any behavior patch.
```

Important correction:

```text
The initial asset-add no-op APK is superseded for ROM use.

It proved that keytool/jarsigner can still read the Smartisan Android v1/JAR
certificate after adding an unsigned entry, but it is not suitable for
system_ext_b:

  system_ext_b filesystem features include shared_blocks
  system_ext_b free blocks: 0

Attempting the v0.10-style held-stock-inode replacement failed:
  write: Could not allocate block in ext2 filesystem

Therefore SystemUI needs a same-size in-place no-op probe, not inode
replacement.
```

## 2026-06-18 - SettingsSmartisan Shared-Blocks-Safe Rebuild

Goal:

```text
Deepen the confidence gate for SettingsSmartisan modifications before any live
v0.6/v0.7/v0.8 flash. The earlier v0.6/v0.7/v0.8 builders predated the
shared_blocks discovery and used debugfs rm + write, so their current artifacts
needed to be rebuilt with the safer held-stock-inode replacement path.
```

Important correction:

```text
The old SettingsSmartisan v0.6/v0.7/v0.8 images are superseded.

Even though their dumped APKs and ZIP integrity looked valid offline, the build
pattern was no longer acceptable after system_b shared_blocks was confirmed.
On shared_blocks ext4 images, rm + write can free blocks still referenced by
other inodes and leave e2fsck to repair conflicts in a way that may corrupt the
replacement file.
```

Tooling updated:

```text
tools/r2-hardrom-build-v0.6-settings-noop.sh
tools/r2-hardrom-build-v0.7-locale-filter.sh
tools/r2-hardrom-build-v0.8-darkmode-ui.sh
tools/r2-verify-settingssmartisan-offline-images.sh
```

Replacement strategy now used by all three SettingsSmartisan builders:

```text
1. keep the stock SettingsSmartisan APK inode referenced through a hidden
   non-.apk held path
2. write the new APK to a hidden temporary path
3. set mode, uid/gid, and SELinux xattr on the temporary inode
4. unlink the public SettingsSmartisan.apk path
5. hardlink the temporary inode to the public path
6. unlink the temporary path
7. run e2fsck -fy, then e2fsck -fn
8. dump the public APK after fsck and verify full APK sha256 plus unzip -t
```

Rebuilt v0.6 Settings no-op:

```text
APK:
  hard-rom/build/apk/SettingsSmartisan-certprobe-noop.apk
  sha256=037fa05464a026a5e599c134d3120a42f6300cb7dddc847f9cb2b1d5a7743c3d

system image:
  hard-rom/build/system-otatrust-v0.6-settings-noop.img
  sha256=9748e6d4b4f04d01461540135de57d8f3c0187b90134fe75793553cb24131bfb

super sparse:
  hard-rom/build/super-otatrust-v0.6-settings-noop-exact-current.sparse.img
  sha256=a06c2e81862c837bef53a4dc2f67c5dea7f0acf78dc7fbbecb6ae4ece26483db
```

## 2026-06-18 - Focused Graph/Source Audit For Settings Confidence

Goal:

```text
Use the existing graphify corpora as an impact navigator, then confirm the
current v0.7/v0.8 strategy directly against the decompiled source. This is the
next confidence layer after the shared_blocks-safe image rebuild.
```

Graph inputs used:

```text
reverse/smartisan-8.5.3-rom-static/graph-corpus/modification-critical/graphify-out/graph.json
reverse/smartisan-8.5.3-rom-static/graph-corpus/feature-control/graphify-out/graph.json
```

Confirmed source anchors:

```text
SettingsSmartisan LocalePickerFragment:
  reverse/smartisan-8.5.3-rom-static/jadx/system__system__priv-app__SettingsSmartisan__SettingsSmartisan.apk/sources/com/android/settings/inputmethod/LocalePickerFragment.java
  constructAdapter(Context) reads Resources.getSystem().getAssets().getLocales(),
  sorts the result, keeps locale strings with length == 5, and creates the
  visible LocaleInfo rows. This confirms v0.7 is a direct visible-picker patch.

framework LocalePicker:
  reverse/smartisan-8.5.3-rom-static/graph-corpus/feature-control/graph-input/java/framework.jar/com/android/internal/app/LocalePicker.java
  getSystemAssetLocales() also reads Resources.getSystem().getAssets().getLocales(),
  confirming that framework resources/overlays remain the broader asset source.

SettingsSmartisan BrightnessSettingsFragment:
  reverse/smartisan-8.5.3-rom-static/jadx/system__system__priv-app__SettingsSmartisan__SettingsSmartisan.apk/sources/com/android/settings/BrightnessSettingsFragment.java
  binds switch_dc and switch_dc_tips, refreshes switch_dc from
  reduce_screen_strobe, and stock handler writes reduce_screen_strobe plus
  Calibration.setReduceScreenStrobeEnable().

SettingsSmartisan brightness_setting.xml:
  switch_dc and switch_dc_tips exist but are android:visibility="gone".
  Stock code only exposes switch_dc when !isDarwin && isSupportDC(), so on R2
  darwin it is a good existing UI carrier for a no-new-resource dark-mode row.

UiModeManagerService:
  setNightMode(int) checks MODIFY_DAY_NIGHT_MODE when night mode is locked.
  setNightModeActivated(boolean) updates configuration and persists
  ui_night_mode without the same explicit permission check in this build.

SmartisanSystemUI QSTileHost:
  createTile(String) maps known toggle... keys, accepts IntentTile specs, and
  accepts CustomTile specs. This confirms the additive app/custom tile probe is
  valid, while native QS integration needs a real toggleDarkMode mapping.

SettingsSmartisan QuickWidgetFactory:
  renders only known Smartisan toggle... keys in the quick-widget editor. A
  native toggleDarkMode tile therefore also needs SettingsSmartisan widget
  rendering support.

SettingsProvider:
  seeds expanded_widget_buttons from def_notification_widget_buttons, maintains
  expanded_widget_buttons_additional, and upgrade code cleans duplicate/dirty
  widget button data. Optional default seeding for toggleDarkMode must respect
  this path.
```

Conclusion:

```text
The current code-level target selection is sound:
  v0.7 targets exactly the visible SettingsSmartisan language picker.
  v0.8 targets an existing hidden row on this darwin device and uses the safer
  UiModeManager.setNightModeActivated(boolean) path.

The remaining live blocker is not source comprehension or image construction.
It is proving the original-cert-preserving SettingsSmartisan core-APK trust
boundary on the device with v0.6.
```

## 2026-06-18 - v0.11 Dark-Mode Integration APK Rebuilt And Audited

Goal:

```text
Move the native dark-mode candidate from two separate SettingsSmartisan ideas
into one coherent APK-level integration:
  Settings display row + Settings quick-widget editor + SystemUI native tile.
No super image was generated and no device action was performed.
```

Build and verifier:

```text
build:
  tools/r2-build-native-darkmode-tile-apks.sh

verify:
  tools/r2-verify-v0.11-native-darkmode-tile-apks.sh

report:
  hard-rom/inspect/v0.11-native-darkmode-tile/verify-v0.11-native-darkmode-tile-apks-20260618-063855.txt
```

Outputs:

```text
SmartisanSystemUI:
  hard-rom/build/apk/SmartisanSystemUI-darkmode-tile.apk
  sha256=396554a9d311f7ca0e6b5eed98a26615f1e9353a82ead6bac2d8ad738243619e

SettingsSmartisan:
  hard-rom/build/apk/SettingsSmartisan-darkmode-ui-widget.apk
  sha256=2831a78f422f037fbe399f1942204be1361a0562e60f38a8531052e5eab92aef

manifest:
  hard-rom/build/apk/native-darkmode-integration-apks.SHA256SUMS.txt
```

Verifier result:

```text
PASS

ZIP integrity passes for both APKs.
SmartisanSystemUI changes are limited to classes10.dex.
SettingsSmartisan changes are limited to classes.dex.
Patched strings exist for:
  toggleDarkMode
  DarkModeTile
  setNightModeActivated
  getNightMode
  uimode
  BrightnessSettingsFragment
  QuickWidgetFactory
Expected keytool/jarsigner SHA-256 digest errors are limited to the changed dex.
```

Focused smali audit:

```text
SettingsSmartisan BrightnessSettingsFragment:
  old reduce_screen_strobe writes are absent from the patched class.
  old Calibration.setReduceScreenStrobeEnable(boolean) call is absent.
  getUiModeManager() resolves through BaseFragment.getSystemService(String),
  which delegates to mContext.getSystemService(String).
  onCheckedChanged(switch_dc) calls setDarkModeActivated(checked).
  onSupportVisible() calls onDarkModeChanged(), which refreshes from
  UiModeManager.getNightMode().

SettingsSmartisan QuickWidgetFactory:
  toggleDarkMode returns QuickWidget(toggleDarkMode, night_mode_yes,
  ic_qs_night_display_on).

SmartisanSystemUI:
  QSTileHost.createTile("toggleDarkMode") returns DarkModeTile.
  DarkModeTile toggles through UiModeManager.setNightModeActivated(boolean),
  with setNightMode(yes/no) fallback.
```

Boundary:

```text
This still does not authorize a flash. SettingsSmartisan v0.6 no-op and the
SmartisanSystemUI no-op gate must pass live first. The candidate also does not
modify SettingsProvider defaults, so it does not force toggleDarkMode into the
existing expanded_widget_buttons list.
```

## 2026-06-18 - v0.10 Locale Prune Verification Gap Closed

Goal:

```text
Raise the language hard-prune gate from decoded-directory checks to binary
resources.arsc policy verification, then rebuild v0.10 if the stronger verifier
finds residue.
No device, fastboot, reboot, misc, or /data action was performed.
```

Finding:

```text
The first binary policy verifier run against the previous v0.10 framework-res
APK found non-target locale chunks that the old values-only checks missed:

  raw:ja_:offset=3407660:size=152
  raw:ko_:offset=3407812:size=152

Root cause:
  the older prune scripts scanned values-* locale dirs only.
  framework-res.apk also has raw-ja and raw-ko resource dirs.
```

Tooling changes:

```text
added:
  tools/r2-verify-apk-locale-policy.py

updated:
  tools/r2-build-framework-res-locale-probe.sh
  tools/r2-build-apk-locale-prune.sh
  tools/r2-build-smartisanos-framework-res-locale-probe.sh
  tools/r2-verify-v0.10-framework-locale-prune.sh

new policy:
  scan/prune all locale-qualified res dirs, not only values-* dirs.
  parse resources.arsc directly and fail if any localized type chunk uses a
  language outside en,zh.
```

Rebuilt outputs:

```text
framework-res locale-prune APK:
  hard-rom/build/apk/framework-res-locale-prune-en-zh.apk
  sha256=10fc36befd0acdb1a1530c6e676cc154170de1bebac5d7eb84b73c24f164aedd
  resources.arsc size=3518900
  removed=61 non-English/non-Chinese framework-res resource dirs
  includes raw-ja/raw-ko removal
  policy result: languages=en,zh; bad_locale_chunk_count=0

v0.10 super sparse:
  hard-rom/build/super-otatrust-v0.10-framework-locale-prune-exact-current.sparse.img
  sha256=62f5006f0c55c71bb405c0b300aa286579bb49a4687c5511a29bf85f98b28cae

system image:
  hard-rom/build/system-otatrust-v0.10-framework-locale-prune.img
  sha256=1a9c2725a25ce48ec7b708ff5cb69e98f6ceae69827ee04e571d7bb15c146351

product image:
  hard-rom/build/product-otatrust-v0.10-framework-locale-prune.img
  sha256=78eb6f500ccf0a719629db206dd140aaf5dd45a5861caee5c829fe024ddd19b2
```

Enhanced offline verifier:

```text
command:
  tools/r2-verify-v0.10-framework-locale-prune.sh --offline-image

report:
  hard-rom/inspect/v0.10-framework-locale-prune/verify-v0.10-offline-image-20260618-065440.txt

result:
  PASS

checks:
  seven APKs dumped from generated system/product images match expected hashes
  all seven dumped APKs pass ZIP integrity checks
  all seven dumped APK resources.arsc files pass:
    tools/r2-verify-apk-locale-policy.py --keep-languages en,zh
```

Boundary:

```text
v0.10 is now a stronger offline candidate: the generated images no longer only
look clean after decode; their embedded APK resource tables also satisfy the
binary en/zh locale policy.

It is still a RED early-boot framework resource candidate.
It has not been flashed or live-verified.
Explicit user confirmation and v0.4 rollback readiness remain required before
any flash.
```

## 2026-06-18 - v0.12 Framework-Res No-Op Gate Prepared

Goal:

```text
Add a smaller live gate before the v0.10 language hard-prune ROM. The new gate
replaces only /system/framework/framework-res.apk with the already verified
framework-res-rebuild-noop.apk, so live testing can separate framework-res
replacement boot risk from actual language-pruned resource behavior.
No device, fastboot, reboot, misc, or /data action was performed.
```

Added scripts:

```text
tools/r2-hardrom-build-v0.12-framework-res-noop.sh
tools/r2-verify-v0.12-framework-res-noop.sh
```

Expected APK input:

```text
hard-rom/build/apk/framework-res-rebuild-noop.apk
sha256=319cd91f8a29c88e8c1058a15bdcd2fbd159a82107add92daf87cbd40fd4240a

signature boundary:
  keytool_status=1
  SHA-256 digest error for resources.arsc
```

Builder shape:

```text
source baseline:
  hard-rom/build/super-otatrust-v0.4-debloat-exact-current.sparse.img

patched partition:
  system_b only

replacement:
  /system/framework/framework-res.apk

shared_blocks handling:
  uses the v0.10 hidden hard-link stock-inode hold pattern before linking the
  no-op rebuilt APK into the public path.
```

Verifier shape:

```text
offline:
  dump /system/framework/framework-res.apk from the generated system image
  compare it to framework-res-rebuild-noop.apk
  verify expected resources.arsc digest boundary
  verify ZIP integrity

device read-only:
  capture boot/slot/root/window/logcat evidence
  pull /system/framework/framework-res.apk
  compare it to framework-res-rebuild-noop.apk
```

Validation performed:

```text
chmod +x tools/r2-hardrom-build-v0.12-framework-res-noop.sh tools/r2-verify-v0.12-framework-res-noop.sh
bash -n tools/r2-hardrom-build-v0.12-framework-res-noop.sh tools/r2-verify-v0.12-framework-res-noop.sh
tools/r2-hardrom-build-v0.12-framework-res-noop.sh --help
tools/r2-verify-v0.12-framework-res-noop.sh --help
```

Pre-live boundary:

```text
The v0.12 ROM image has not been built yet.
Current local free space is about 16GiB, while this build needs room for an
expanded raw super, extracted system image, and a new 8GiB sparse super.
Build after freeing local space or by setting WORK_DIR to a sufficiently large
external volume.
```

## 2026-06-18 - v0.12 Flashable Sparse Built By Direct Sparse Rewrite

Goal:

```text
Generate the v0.12 framework-res no-op flashable sparse super without expanding
a full raw super, so the framework-res live gate can proceed once explicitly
authorized.
No device, fastboot, reboot, misc, or /data action was performed.
```

New sparse tool:

```text
tools/r2-sparse-partition-patch.py
```

Sparse finding:

```text
command:
  tools/r2-sparse-partition-patch.py \
    --source-sparse hard-rom/build/super-otatrust-v0.4-debloat-exact-current.sparse.img \
    --print-map --partition system_b

result:
  block_size=4096
  total_blocks=2621440
  total_chunks=552
  chunk_counts=FILL:270,RAW:282
  system_b crosses FILL chunk 282 at logical block 1310970

meaning:
  v0.12 could not be produced by a simple APFS clone plus raw-chunk in-place
  patch. The tool used rewrite-sparse mode and emitted a new sparse image while
  replacing the system_b logical range with RAW chunks from the v0.12 system
  image.
```

Build command:

```bash
tools/r2-sparse-partition-patch.py \
  --source-sparse hard-rom/build/super-otatrust-v0.4-debloat-exact-current.sparse.img \
  --out hard-rom/build/super-otatrust-v0.12-framework-res-noop-exact-current.sparse.img \
  --image system_b=hard-rom/build/system-otatrust-v0.12-framework-res-noop.img \
  --variant otatrust-v0.12-framework-res-noop-exact-current
```

Output:

```text
super sparse:
  hard-rom/build/super-otatrust-v0.12-framework-res-noop-exact-current.sparse.img
  sha256=d5c63890f27f6609b09667cc0bee0dd4b55c5c335abeb530650c16fbce9d94d9

manifest:
  hard-rom/build/super-otatrust-v0.12-framework-res-noop-exact-current.sparse.img.SHA256SUMS.txt

system image:
  hard-rom/build/system-otatrust-v0.12-framework-res-noop.img
  sha256=26c9255a0ec2b397b7c88292d82916ce611c5c08f60dd7a7305476f74bf77fa0
```

Sparse slice verification:

```text
command:
  tools/r2-sparse-partition-patch.py \
    --source-sparse hard-rom/build/super-otatrust-v0.12-framework-res-noop-exact-current.sparse.img \
    --verify-image system_b=hard-rom/build/system-otatrust-v0.12-framework-res-noop.img

result:
  system_b image sha256 equals sparse_slice sha256:
    26c9255a0ec2b397b7c88292d82916ce611c5c08f60dd7a7305476f74bf77fa0
```

Enhanced offline verifier:

```text
command:
  tools/r2-verify-v0.12-framework-res-noop.sh --offline-image

report:
  hard-rom/inspect/v0.12-framework-res-noop/verify-v0.12-offline-image-20260618-071439.txt

result:
  PASS

checks:
  expected resources.arsc digest-error boundary exists
  framework-res.apk dumped from system image matches framework-res-rebuild-noop.apk
  dumped APK ZIP integrity passes
  sparse super system_b logical slice matches the generated v0.12 system image
```

Boundary:

```text
v0.12 is now a flashable sparse candidate, but it is not flashed or
live-verified. It remains a RED early-boot framework resource no-op gate.
Explicit user confirmation, v0.4 rollback readiness, and post-boot read-only
verification remain required before proceeding to v0.10.
```

## 2026-06-18 - v0.10 Sparse Slice Verification Added

Goal:

```text
Carry the new sparse logical-slice verifier back into the v0.10 language
hard-prune candidate, so the verifier proves not only that the generated
system/product images are correct, but also that the flashable sparse super
actually contains those exact system_b/product_b logical partitions.
No device, fastboot, reboot, misc, or /data action was performed.
```

Tooling change:

```text
tools/r2-sparse-partition-patch.py
  --verify-image now hashes sparse logical partition ranges across RAW, FILL,
  and DONT_CARE chunks instead of requiring the whole range to be RAW.

tools/r2-verify-v0.10-framework-locale-prune.sh
  --offline-image now runs:
    tools/r2-sparse-partition-patch.py \
      --source-sparse hard-rom/build/super-otatrust-v0.10-framework-locale-prune-exact-current.sparse.img \
      --verify-image system_b=hard-rom/build/system-otatrust-v0.10-framework-locale-prune.img \
      --verify-image product_b=hard-rom/build/product-otatrust-v0.10-framework-locale-prune.img
```

Verification result:

```text
command:
  tools/r2-verify-v0.10-framework-locale-prune.sh --offline-image

report:
  hard-rom/inspect/v0.10-framework-locale-prune/verify-v0.10-offline-image-20260618-071729.txt

result:
  PASS

sparse slice evidence:
  system_b image sha256 equals sparse_slice sha256:
    1a9c2725a25ce48ec7b708ff5cb69e98f6ceae69827ee04e571d7bb15c146351
  product_b image sha256 equals sparse_slice sha256:
    78eb6f500ccf0a719629db206dd140aaf5dd45a5861caee5c829fe024ddd19b2

resource evidence retained:
  seven dumped APKs match expected hashes
  seven dumped APKs pass en/zh binary resources.arsc locale policy
  expected resources.arsc digest-error boundary exists
```

Boundary:

```text
v0.10 remains not flashed and not live-verified. This strengthens the offline
image proof only; the next safe live sequence is still v0.12 framework-res
no-op first, then v0.10 only if v0.12 boots cleanly.
```

```text
  hash, latest offline evidence report, verifier script, and adb/fastboot state
  when available. Supported gates: v0.12-framework-res-noop,
  v0.10-framework-locale-prune, v0.6-settings-noop, and
```

## 2026-06-18 - v0.11 Native Dark-Mode Verifier Strengthened

Goal:

```text
Make the native dark-mode candidate evidence stronger than hash/string checks,
so the APK-only verifier proves concrete smali-level call sites for the intended
Settings/SystemUI integration.
No device, fastboot, reboot, misc, /data, or ROM image action was performed.
```

Updated script:

```text
tools/r2-verify-v0.11-native-darkmode-tile-apks.sh
```

New verifier behavior:

```text
1. Confirms SmartisanSystemUI changed only classes10.dex.
2. Confirms SettingsSmartisan changed only classes.dex.
3. Confirms expected patched strings remain present.
4. Decodes both candidate APKs to temporary smali with apktool -r --no-assets.
5. Copies only four evidence files into hard-rom/inspect:
     SystemUI-DarkModeTile.smali
     SystemUI-QSTileHost.smali
     Settings-BrightnessSettingsFragment.smali
     Settings-QuickWidgetFactory.smali
6. Verifies concrete call sites:
     DarkModeTile calls UiModeManager.setNightModeActivated(boolean),
       setNightMode(int), and getNightMode()
     QSTileHost maps "toggleDarkMode" to DarkModeTile
     BrightnessSettingsFragment exposes getUiModeManager(),
       onDarkModeChanged(), setDarkModeActivated(boolean), and no longer uses
       the old reduce_screen_strobe/Calibration handler
     QuickWidgetFactory renders "toggleDarkMode" as a QuickWidget
7. Verifies the expected classes.dex/classes10.dex signature digest boundary.
```

```text

smali evidence:

```

```text
route, instead of treating v0.7 visible filtering and v0.10 framework/product
resource pruning as the whole language-prune problem.

```


```text
  175 packages, 509 dirs

```

```text

  22 packages, 44 dirs
  tier1a_minimal_exposure:
    3 packages, 6 dirs
    com.android.protips
    com.android.printservice.recommendation
    com.android.hotspot2.osulogin
```

First-batch replace preflight spot-check:

```text
commands:
  tools/r2-rom-mod-preflight.py com.android.protips --action replace --limit 12
  tools/r2-rom-mod-preflight.py com.android.printservice.recommendation --action replace --limit 12
  tools/r2-rom-mod-preflight.py com.android.hotspot2.osulogin --action replace --limit 12
  tools/r2-rom-mod-preflight.py com.smartisanos.share.browser --action replace --limit 12

result:
  com.android.protips:
    overall_level=ORANGE only because same-package replacement requires
    preserving manifest/resources/signature/package-cache behavior.
    package status=ok; one receiver; no exported components; no permissions.

  com.android.printservice.recommendation:
    overall_level=ORANGE.
    package status=ok; one service; no exported components; two permissions;
    hidden-api whitelist sysconfig reference.

  com.android.hotspot2.osulogin:
    overall_level=ORANGE.
    package status=ok; one activity; no exported components; three network/wifi
    permissions.

  com.smartisanos.share.browser:
    overall_level=ORANGE.
    package status=recoverable-errors; one activity; no exported components;
    four permissions.
    Because the package index status is not ok, it is now classified as
    tier1c_needs_extra_package_review instead of tier1a_minimal_exposure.
```

Boundary:

```text
The audit is read-only and does not authorize flashing. It is now the first
reference before selecting the next language hard-prune target. v0.7 remains
visible filtering only; v0.10 covers framework-res, framework-smartisanos-res,
and five product DisplayCutout overlays only.
```

## 2026-06-18 - System Modification Readiness Audit Added

Goal:

```text
Create a current-state audit that directly answers whether the two active user
goals are actually complete:
  1. native system-level light/dark mode integration
  2. English/Chinese-only ROM language hard-pruning

No device, fastboot, reboot, misc, /data, APK, or ROM image action was
performed.
```

Added script:

```text
tools/r2-system-mod-readiness-audit.py
```

Generated outputs:

```text
docs/research/system-modification-readiness-audit.md
reverse/smartisan-8.5.3-rom-static/manifest/system-modification-readiness-audit.tsv
```

Verification:

```text
command:
  PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 tools/r2-system-mod-readiness-audit.py

result:
  checks=15
  proven_offline=10
  missing=4
  not_achieved=1
```

Current missing/not-achieved items:

```text
dark mode:
  SettingsSmartisan no-op replacement has not booted and verified live.
  SmartisanSystemUI no-op replacement has not booted and verified live.
  combined v0.11 exact-current dark-mode ROM image does not exist yet.

language hard-prune:
  v0.12 framework-res no-op has not booted and verified live.
  148 packages and 390 ja/ko dirs remain outside current deletion or hard-prune
  coverage.
```

Boundary:

```text
The readiness audit intentionally prevents over-claiming. v0.11 dark-mode APKs,
v0.12 framework-res no-op, and v0.10 framework/product language prune are strong
offline candidates, but the user-facing goals are not complete until the live
gates pass and the remaining language resources are actually removed or
otherwise covered.
```

## 2026-06-18 - v0.13 Tier1a Locale-Prune system_b Image Built And Verified

Goal:

```text
Move the already verified Tier1a APK language hard-prune batch from APK-level
proof into a modified ROM system_b image, without generating a flashable super
or touching the live device.

No device, fastboot, reboot, misc, /data, or flash action was performed.
```

Added sparse helper capability:

```text
tools/r2-sparse-partition-patch.py --extract-image PARTITION=OUT_IMAGE
```

Reason:

```text
The v0.4 sparse super system_b range crosses FILL chunks, so raw-only clone
patching cannot safely inspect/extract it. The new extractor reconstructs
logical partition bytes from RAW/FILL/DONT_CARE sparse chunks without expanding
the full raw super.
```

Smoke test:

```text
command:
  tools/r2-sparse-partition-patch.py \
    --source-sparse hard-rom/build/super-otatrust-v0.4-debloat-exact-current.sparse.img \
    --extract-image odm_b=/tmp/r2-sparse-extract-odm-b-test.img

  tools/r2-sparse-partition-patch.py \
    --source-sparse hard-rom/build/super-otatrust-v0.4-debloat-exact-current.sparse.img \
    --verify-image odm_b=/tmp/r2-sparse-extract-odm-b-test.img

result:
  extracted sha256=8ffd2ccb8585e8cfb6ea7bcd108057025e33d47da4a5992fdd3ad71eb515474b
  sparse_slice sha256 matched
```

Added build and verify scripts:

```text
tools/r2-hardrom-build-v0.13-tier1a-locale-prune.sh
tools/r2-verify-v0.13-tier1a-locale-prune.sh
```

Build command:

```text
tools/r2-hardrom-build-v0.13-tier1a-locale-prune.sh
```

Build behavior:

```text
default BUILD_SUPER=0 because local free space is tight
extracts system_b from the v0.4 stable sparse super
uses the shared_blocks-safe held-stock-inode replacement pattern
replaces:
  /system/app/Protips/Protips.apk
  /system/app/PrintRecommendationService/PrintRecommendationService.apk
  /system/apex/com.android.wifi/app/OsuLogin/OsuLogin.apk
runs e2fsck -fy and e2fsck -fn
dumps each replaced APK after fsck and verifies hash plus ZIP integrity
```

Output:

```text
system image:
  hard-rom/build/system-otatrust-v0.13-tier1a-locale-prune.img
  sha256=e77643153a9e03fc48b5e47a0841c6322dc390eb3381ff40a24e98ae03f905bb

manifest:
  hard-rom/build/super-otatrust-v0.13-tier1a-locale-prune-exact-current.SHA256SUMS.txt

flashable sparse super:
  not built
```

```text
command:
  tools/r2-verify-v0.13-tier1a-locale-prune.sh --offline-system-image

report:
  hard-rom/inspect/v0.13-tier1a-locale-prune/verify-v0.13-offline-system-image-20260618-081444.txt

result:
  PASS
```

Verifier coverage:

```text
  sha256=12e0fc8cc46e9bfe2eacd1b142a945e678661d0062c4d108d3358a27e8827f7d

system/PrintRecommendationService.apk
  sha256=3d92952e74308a3402e0debb5a0ca0a1c909b5cc1990968ccfcbe73377ceb806

system/OsuLogin.apk
```

## 2026-06-18 - Dark Mode Source-Coupling Audit Added

Goal:

```text
Turn the native dark-mode route from scattered source findings into a
repeatable read-only audit before any Settings/SystemUI behavior ROM is built.
```

Added:

```text
tools/r2-darkmode-source-coupling-audit.py
docs/research/darkmode-source-coupling-audit.md
reverse/smartisan-8.5.3-rom-static/manifest/darkmode-source-coupling-audit.tsv
```

Command:

```text
PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 tools/r2-darkmode-source-coupling-audit.py
```

Result:

```text
findings=20
stock_supported=1
stock_slot_available=1
stock_factory_supported=1
stock_host_supported=1
stock_resource_available=4
stock_persistence_supported=3
stock_missing_entry=3
default_seeding_gap=1
candidate_proven_offline=2
missing_live_gate=2
missing_rom_image=1
```

Meaning:

```text
UiModeManagerService already has the stock Android night-mode backend.
SettingsSmartisan has a hidden display-row slot and existing night_mode_yes
resource, but no stock UiModeManager entry.
SmartisanSystemUI has the Smartisan expanded_widget_buttons/native toggle-key
host path, but no stock toggleDarkMode branch.
SettingsProvider seeds expanded_widget_buttons from def_notification_widget_buttons,
and SettingsSmartisan's quick-widget editor writes expanded_widget_buttons then
broadcasts WIDGET_BUTTONS_CHANGED to SystemUI.
Stock default quick-widget strings do not include toggleDarkMode, so default QS
visibility is a separate SettingsProvider/resource or live data migration
decision.
v0.11 APK semantics are proven offline at the call-site level.
SettingsSmartisan and SmartisanSystemUI live no-op gates are still missing, and
the combined v0.11 sparse super is intentionally not built.
```

Readiness refresh:

```text
PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 tools/r2-system-mod-readiness-audit.py

checks=21
proven_offline=15
missing=5
not_achieved=1
```

## 2026-06-18 - Language Source-Coupling Audit Added

Goal:

```text
Turn the English/Chinese-only language route from package/resource inventory
into a repeatable source-coupling audit before claiming the ROM can be safely
hard-pruned.
```

Added:

```text
tools/r2-language-source-coupling-audit.py
docs/research/language-source-coupling-audit.md
reverse/smartisan-8.5.3-rom-static/manifest/language-source-coupling-audit.tsv
```

Command:

```text
PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 tools/r2-language-source-coupling-audit.py
```

Result:

```text
findings=22
stock_visible_picker_coupled_to_assets=1
settings_locale_resource_coupling=1
stock_framework_picker_coupled_to_assets=1
stock_system_asset_source_mapped=1
stock_package_asset_source_mapped=1
stock_resource_fallback_coupled_to_assets=1
stock_framework_locale_arrays_broad=1
stock_android_static_overlay_mapped=1
stock_locale_resources_present=4
stock_non_ui_locale_coupling=3
candidate_proven_offline=3
coverage_measured_incomplete=1
missing_live_gate=2
missing_rom_image=1
```

Meaning:

```text
Smartisan Settings LocalePickerFragment builds the visible language list from
Resources.getSystem().getAssets().getLocales(), then filters strings by
length == 5 before creating Locale rows.
AOSP LocalePicker also has an AssetManager-backed picker path.
AssetManager system assets are created from framework-res.apk,
framework-smartisanos-res.apk, and immutable static overlays targeting android.
ResourcesManager and ResourcesImpl add per-package resources, splits, overlays,
and best-locale fallback on top of the system assets.
SettingsSmartisan still contains ja/ko resource dirs, including locale-specific
font-scale arrays.
Telephony/SIM helper paths also read context.getAssets().getLocales(), so the
language hard-prune goal is not only a visible Settings UI problem.
v0.7, v0.10, and v0.13 remain offline-proven candidates for their respective
layers, but live gates and full coverage are still missing.
```

Readiness refresh:

```text
PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 tools/r2-system-mod-readiness-audit.py

checks=22
proven_offline=16
missing=5
not_achieved=1
```
*** End of File

## 2026-06-18 - Dark Mode QS Strategy Audit Added

Goal:

```text
Turn the native dark-mode QS work from "patched call sites exist" into a
concrete Smartisan quick-widget strategy that accounts for stock defaults,
editor rendering, framework widget registry limits, backup/restore splitting,
and current live-state prerequisites.
```

Added:

```text
tools/r2-darkmode-qs-strategy-audit.py
docs/research/darkmode-qs-strategy-audit.md
reverse/smartisan-8.5.3-rom-static/manifest/darkmode-qs-strategy-audit.tsv
```

Commands:

```text
PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 tools/r2-darkmode-qs-strategy-audit.py
PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 tools/r2-system-mod-readiness-audit.py
```

QS strategy result:

```text
rows=52
capacity_full=1
missing_live_state=1
registry_limited=1
requires_displacement=1
requires_framework_registry_patch=1
requires_settingssmartisan_candidate_injection=1
restore_split_mapped=1
settingssmartisan_local_candidate_patch_available=1
stock_missing_native_key=1
```

Top-level readiness refresh:

```text
checks=28
proven_offline=21
missing=6
not_achieved=1
```

Meaning:

```text
The intended final native key is one stable Smartisan-style toggleDarkMode key.
SystemUI-only tile creation is insufficient: SettingsSmartisan also needs to
render the key, and Smartisan's widget registry/candidate path controls whether
the editor can offer it.

The phone default quick-widget list is already full at 20 entries. A
default-visible dark-mode route must replace exactly one existing phone default
key, not append a 21st key.

The framework-registry editor/additional route needs a
SettingsSmt.NOTIFICATION_WIDGET registry patch, but source review now shows a
lower-risk equivalent route: NotificationCustomView owns the visible additional
list, falls back through SettingsUtil, renders candidates through
QuickWidgetFactory, and writes expanded_widget_buttons_additional itself.
Therefore v0.11 should first grow a SettingsSmartisan-local candidate injection
helper instead of changing smartisanos.jar.

QuickWidgetFactory rendering alone is not enough. NotificationCustomView still
does not mention toggleDarkMode, so the next SettingsSmartisan patch must cover
getCurrentAdditionalQuickWidgetSettings(), reset/default additional behavior,
and checkValidity()'s reset path.

SettingsBackupAgent's first-20/additional split is now mapped, so a final design
can be checked against restore normalization before any ROM flash.

The live dark-mode/QS state is still missing because no adb device was available
for the latest read-only live-state audit. Do not choose a displacement or live
migration until the booted device state is captured.
```

Mutation:

```text
No flash, no reboot, no /data mutation, no new image build.
```

## 2026-06-18 - v0.14a LiveWallpapersPicker APK Locale-Prune Probe

Goal:

```text
Continue deepening the English/Chinese-only hard-prune route with the next
low-exposure APK resource-table probe, without producing another large ROM
image while local disk space is tight.
```

Reviewed:

```text
tools/r2-rom-mod-preflight.py com.android.wallpaper.livepicker --action replace
graphify query on PackageManagerService/SmtEx replacement paths
graphify query on ResourcesManagerSmtEx/AssetManagerSmtEx/IconManager paths
graphify query on OverlayManager/SystemConfig paths
graphify query on package cache/resource loading/boot-order paths
LiveWallpapersPicker AndroidManifest.xml and package source
SystemConfig install-in-user-type and platform system-user-blacklisted-app refs
```

Finding:

```text
Preflight is ORANGE only because the package is referenced by sysconfig and
same-package replacement needs normal caution. The package is a non-priv system
app with no sharedUserId, no providers, no exported components in the static
component index, and no package-specific overlay coupling. Its source is the
Android live wallpaper chooser/preview path; the planned mutation only changes
resources.arsc.
```

Built:

```text
tools/r2-build-apk-locale-prune.sh --package com.android.wallpaper.livepicker

APK:
  hard-rom/build/apk/com.android.wallpaper.livepicker-locale-prune-en-zh.apk
sha256:
  aef8b6bcd7d76de0448b1c70e4239173c079f998f8090bf49084acff95cbd0d2
stock sha256:
```

## 2026-06-18 - Dark Mode QS Seeding/Restore Coupling Deepened

Goal:

```text
Deepen the native dark-mode route from "the Settings/SystemUI call sites exist"
to "default visibility and Settings editor integration can be designed without
breaking Smartisan's quick-widget persistence model."
```

Updated:

```text
tools/r2-darkmode-source-coupling-audit.py
docs/research/darkmode-source-coupling-audit.md
reverse/smartisan-8.5.3-rom-static/manifest/darkmode-source-coupling-audit.tsv
```

Command:

```text
PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 tools/r2-darkmode-source-coupling-audit.py
```

Result:

```text
findings=25
stock_supported=1
stock_slot_available=1
stock_factory_supported=1
stock_host_supported=1
stock_resource_available=4
stock_persistence_supported=5
stock_restore_path_mapped=1
stock_widget_registry_limited=1
stock_default_capacity_full=1
stock_missing_entry=3
default_seeding_gap=1
candidate_proven_offline=2
missing_live_gate=2
missing_rom_image=1
```

New meaning:

```text
SettingsProvider's stock upgrade path seeds secure ui_night_mode as value 1.
QSTileHost caps the phone quick-settings first page at 20 entries.
SettingsProvider's stock def_notification_widget_buttons string already has
20 entries on the phone path, so toggleDarkMode cannot be blindly appended as
entry 21.
SettingsUtil builds additional-widget candidates from
SettingsSmt.NOTIFICATION_WIDGET.getAllWidgets().
Stock SettingsSmt.NOTIFICATION_WIDGET does not include toggleDarkMode, so the
Settings editor will not offer it as an additional candidate unless the default
list, SettingsSmartisan candidate path, or framework registry path is patched.
SettingsBackupAgent can normalize restored widget lists by splitting the first
20 entries into expanded_widget_buttons and the remainder into
expanded_widget_buttons_additional, so a durable default strategy must also
survive restore normalization.
```

Design consequence:

```text
v0.11 remains the correct native APK call-site candidate, but default QS
visibility is now a concrete separate design decision:

1. replace one existing phone default tile with toggleDarkMode;
2. or keep toggleDarkMode out of the first-page default and patch the
   SettingsSmartisan candidate/editor path;
3. or perform a live user-data migration after the core APK gates pass.

Do not append toggleDarkMode to the stock phone default string without choosing
which existing first-page tile is displaced.
```

Readiness refresh:

```text
PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 tools/r2-system-mod-readiness-audit.py

checks=22
proven_offline=16
missing=5
not_achieved=1
```

## 2026-06-18 - Dark Mode SettingsSmartisan Candidate Route Mapped

Goal:

```text
Deepen the native dark-mode QS editor route enough to decide whether the
missing toggleDarkMode candidate should first be solved by patching
smartisanos.jar SettingsSmt.NOTIFICATION_WIDGET or by a smaller
SettingsSmartisan-local patch.
```

Updated:

```text
tools/r2-darkmode-qs-strategy-audit.py
tools/r2-system-mod-readiness-audit.py
docs/research/darkmode-qs-strategy-audit.md

docs/research/system-modification-confidence.md
README.md
.agents/skills/smartisan-r2-hardrom/SKILL.md
```

```text

PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 tools/r2-system-mod-readiness-audit.py
PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 -m py_compile tools/r2-darkmode-qs-strategy-audit.py tools/r2-system-mod-readiness-audit.py
```

QS strategy result:

```text
rows=52
capacity_full=1
missing_live_state=1
registry_limited=1
requires_displacement=1
requires_framework_registry_patch=1
requires_settingssmartisan_candidate_injection=1
restore_split_mapped=1
settingssmartisan_local_candidate_patch_available=1
stock_missing_native_key=1
```

Top-level readiness refresh:

```text
checks=28
proven_offline=21
missing=6
not_achieved=1
```

Source finding:

```text
NotificationCustomView.getCurrentAdditionalQuickWidgetSettings() reads
expanded_widget_buttons_additional and falls back to
SettingsUtil.getAdditionalNotificationWidgets(context,
getCurrentQuickWidgetSettings(context)).

NotificationCustomView.loadCandidateWidgetData() renders each candidate through
QuickWidgetFactory.getWidget().

NotificationCustomView.saveWidgetButtonsAndNotify() writes
expanded_widget_buttons_additional itself.

NotificationCustomView.resetSettings() uses getDefaultAdditionalOrderSettings().

NotificationCustomView.checkValidity() can reset additional widgets through a
direct SettingsUtil.getAdditionalNotificationWidgets(...) call, so any local
candidate helper must also cover this reset path.
```

Design consequence:

```text
QuickWidgetFactory rendering is necessary but not sufficient. The editor cannot
offer toggleDarkMode unless the additional list contains the key.

The preferred next offline v0.11 refinement is a SettingsSmartisan-local helper
that appends toggleDarkMode to additional/default/reset candidate strings when
it is not already present in the first-page or additional lists. This avoids a
broader smartisanos.jar SettingsSmt.NOTIFICATION_WIDGET registry patch as the
first route.

Framework registry patching remains a possible broader route, but it is no
longer the preferred first integration step.
```

Mutation:

```text
No flash, no reboot, no /data mutation, no new ROM image build.
```

## 2026-06-18 - Language Prune Integration Map And Live-State Audit Added

Intent:

```text
Deepen the English/Chinese-only ROM goal from coverage tables into an
end-to-end implementation route, matching the level of rigor now used for
native dark-mode integration.
```

New/updated evidence:

```text
docs/research/language-prune-integration-map.md

tools/r2-system-mod-readiness-audit.py

.agents/skills/smartisan-r2-hardrom/SKILL.md

docs/research/system-modification-readiness-audit.md
reverse/smartisan-8.5.3-rom-static/manifest/system-modification-readiness-audit.tsv
```

Language policy clarified:

```text
Visible system language target:
  en-US
  zh-Hans-CN
  zh-Hant-TW

First-stage resource retention:
  keep all en* and zh* compiled resource configs
  remove non-English/non-Chinese configs such as ja*, ko*, ar*, de*, fr*, etc.

Reason:
  Chinese resource fallback may use region/script variants. Removing all
  non-target language families first is safer than prematurely pruning Chinese
  regional variants.
```

Source route captured:

```text
SettingsSmartisan LocalePickerFragment:
  Resources.getSystem().getAssets().getLocales()
  length==5 regioned locale entries

AOSP LocalePicker:
  raw system asset locales plus supported_locales array

AssetManager:
  framework-res.apk
  framework-smartisanos-res.apk
  immutable android idmaps

ResourcesImpl:
  getNonSystemLocales()
  getLocales()
  English-supported best-locale fallback

Telephony/SIM helpers:
  MccTable, IccRecords, and RuimRecords read context asset locales.
```

New read-only live audit:

```text
tools/r2-language-live-state-audit.sh captures:
  locale properties
  activity configuration
  Settings system_locales keys
  current input method/subtype
  package paths for language-sensitive targets
  updated-system /data/app shadow state
  window/keyguard focus
  recent locale/resource logs
```

Commands:

```text
bash -n tools/r2-language-live-state-audit.sh
```

Current decision:

```text
The language-prune implementation route is now mapped well enough to stage:
  L0 language live-state capture
  L1 v0.6 SettingsSmartisan no-op

The user-facing language goal is still incomplete because live-state, live
framework gates, sparse v0.13, APK-only promotion, and full package coverage
are missing.
```

```text
No flash, no reboot, no settings write, no package mutation, no /data mutation,
no new ROM image build.
```

## 2026-06-18 - Native Dark Mode Integration Map And Live-State Audit Guard Strengthening

Intent:

```text
Deepen system-modification confidence by turning native dark-mode work into a
source-backed integration map instead of a loose set of APK call-site patches.
This was a documentation and read-only audit pass only.
```

New/updated evidence:

```text
docs/research/darkmode-integration-map.md
docs/research/system-modification-playbook.md
README.md
docs/README.md
.agents/skills/smartisan-r2-hardrom/SKILL.md
docs/research/system-modification-confidence.md
tools/r2-darkmode-live-state-audit.sh
tools/r2-darkmode-source-coupling-audit.py
tools/r2-darkmode-qs-strategy-audit.py
tools/r2-system-mod-readiness-audit.py
```

Source findings now captured as an integration map:

```text
UiModeManagerService:
  Settings.Secure ui_night_mode is the durable backend.
  setNightModeActivated(boolean) updates day/night configuration and persists.

SettingsSmartisan:
  BrightnessSettingsFragment has a Darwin-hidden switch_dc row suitable for the
  first no-new-resources dark-mode entry.
  QuickWidgetFactory must render the native toggleDarkMode key.
  NotificationCustomView owns editor/additional/reset save paths.

SmartisanSystemUI:
  QSTileHost loads Settings.System expanded_widget_buttons through the
  Smartisan widget setting and truncates the first page at 20 entries.
  A native toggleDarkMode branch is required for Smartisan-style integration.

SettingsProvider/restore:
  defaults, upgrade cleanup, duplicate removal, first-page splitting, and
  restore normalization can all affect whether toggleDarkMode survives.
```

Generalized system-modification rule added:

```text
docs/research/system-modification-playbook.md now separates future work into:
  hard delete
  same-package non-core replacement
  core shared-UID APK replacement
  app-level resource hard-prune
  framework resource replacement
  SettingsProvider defaults/migrations
  SystemUI/Keyguard/Launcher/Phone boot-surface changes

Each class has its own required gates. Live-gate confidence is not transferable
between core packages.
```

Audit guard strengthening:

```text
tools/r2-darkmode-live-state-audit.sh now parses Smartisan QS settings from
system/secure/global namespaces and reports count, toggleDarkMode presence,
over-20 state, and duplicates for expanded_widget_buttons and
expanded_widget_buttons_additional.

The source-coupling, QS strategy, and top-level readiness audits now require the
Settings.System QS markers in any successful live-state report. This prevents a
future report from passing while missing the namespace QSTileHost and
NotificationCustomView actually read.
```

Commands:

```text
bash -n tools/r2-darkmode-live-state-audit.sh
```

Current decision:

```text
The native dark-mode route is coherent enough to implement a combined ROM after
the live gates pass, but it is not flash-authorized yet.

Next required gates remain:
  D0: capture a successful live UiMode/QS state report on the booted phone.
  D1: flash and verify v0.6 SettingsSmartisan no-op.
  D2: flash and verify SmartisanSystemUI certprobe no-op.
  D3: build the combined v0.11 exact-current ROM only after D1/D2.
```

Mutation:

```text
No flash, no reboot, no /data mutation, no package mutation, no new ROM image
build.
```

## 2026-06-18 - Resource Loading Model Deepened With Graphify And Static Source

Goal:

```text
Improve confidence for future system modifications by tracing the Android and
Smartisan resource loading path instead of treating resource changes as isolated
APK edits.
```

Sources:

```text
graphify corpus:
  reverse/smartisan-8.5.3-rom-static/graph-corpus/modification-critical/

direct source reads:
  graph-input/java/framework.jar/android/content/res/AssetManager.java
  graph-input/java/framework.jar/android/app/ResourcesManager.java
  graph-input/java/framework.jar/android/content/res/ResourcesImpl.java
  graph-input/java/framework.jar/android/content/res/AssetManagerSmtEx.java
  graph-input/java/framework.jar/android/app/ResourcesManagerSmtEx.java
  graph-input/java/framework.jar/android/content/res/ResourcesImplSmtEx.java
```

Output:

```text
docs/research/resource-loading-map.md
```

Key findings:

```text
AssetManager.createSystemAssetsInZygoteLocked() loads framework-res.apk,
framework-smartisanos-res.apk, and immutable framework idmaps into the system
asset set.

AssetManager.Builder.build() and ResourcesManager.createAssetManager() layer app
resources, splits, libs, loaders, and overlay idmaps on top of those system
assets.

ResourcesImpl.updateConfiguration() prefers non-system locales for package
resource fallback, then falls back to all asset locales when needed.

ResourcesManager.createResourcesImpl() calls ResourcesManagerSmtEx.attachIconAssets()
before constructing ResourcesImpl, so Smartisan icon redirection is part of
resource cache freshness and drawable loading.
```

Design consequence:

```text
Low-exposure APK-level resources.arsc pruning is now understood as a package
resource-table operation, not a global language-universe change.

Framework/global language pruning remains a separate early-boot asset change
behind v0.12/v0.10 live gates.

Icon-sensitive same-package replacement must include live /data/system/icon and
redirection-policy checks because Smartisan attaches icon redirection maps to
AssetManager instances.
```

Mutation:

```text
No flash, no reboot, no /data mutation, no ROM image build.
```

Boundary:

```text
The new APK-only manifest and verifier raise confidence in the package-level
resource surgery workflow, but they do not build a ROM image and do not prove
boot behavior. The language hard-prune goal remains incomplete until selected
APK-only candidates are promoted into system/product images, flashed, booted,
and verified on the live device.
```

Mutation:

```text
No flash, no reboot, no /data mutation, no new ROM image build.
```

```text
allocation on the current reference inode. Each future same-size/in-place target
must re-run exact size, stored-resource, extent, icheck owner, fsck, dumped-APK
hash, ZIP, signature-boundary, and locale-policy gates.
```

```text
No flash, no reboot, no /data mutation, no super image build. A local cloned
system_ext test image was written for verification and may be deleted after
recording the reports above.
```

```text
correct" to "binary resources are correct and resources.arsc keeps the stock
system APK ZIP shape". This reduces Android AssetManager/package parsing risk
before promoting APK-only candidates into ROM images.
```

```text
behavior ROM should stay editor/additional-first. Default-visible behavior
should remain a later D5 decision after live no-op gates and live-state capture.
```

```text

shared-UID, SettingsProvider database, backup/restore, or SystemUI behavior.
SettingsSmartisan and SmartisanSystemUI live no-op gates remain required before
any behavior ROM flash.
```

```text
No flash, no reboot, no /data mutation, no APK rebuild, no super image build.
```

```text
intermediate image was intentionally cleaned and must be rebuilt before
```

```text

review" into APK-only evidence. Target package:
com.smartisanos.share.browser, stock path
/system/app/SmartisanShareBrowser/SmartisanShareBrowser.apk.
```

Focused review:

```text
tools/r2-rom-mod-preflight.py com.smartisanos.share.browser --action inspect
  overall_level=GREEN

tools/r2-rom-mod-preflight.py com.smartisanos.share.browser --action replace
  overall_level=ORANGE
  reason=same-package replacement must preserve manifest, authorities, ABI,
         resources, signatures, and package cache behavior

App-owned source:
  ShareActivity.java 72 lines
  R.java 214 lines
  Manifest.java 9 lines

ShareActivity behavior:
  private action com.smartisanos.share.browser.WX
  signatureOrSystem permission com.smartisanos.share.permission.SHARE
  creates/registers WeChat API, forwards webpage share payload, then finish()

No app-owned hits for:
  getLocales/getAssets/getResources/getIdentifier/Locale/ACTION_LOCALE_CHANGED/
  CONFIGURATION_CHANGED/onConfigurationChanged/startActivity/BOOT_COMPLETED/
  HOME/Keyguard/Launcher/Shortcut/Icon

Graphify follow-up:
  PackageManagerService paths are the generic scan/package-info/preferred-
  activity/delete/cache routes.
  ResourcesManagerSmtEx/AssetManagerSmtEx/IconManager paths confirm the generic
  Smartisan resource/icon redirection cache risk.
  No package-specific sysconfig, overlay, boot, home, or keyguard coupling was
  found for com.smartisanos.share.browser.
```

## 2026-06-18 - v0.21a TrackerSmartisan APK-Only Locale Prune

Goal:

```text
Advance the English/Chinese-only hard-prune route with one more small,
package-reviewed APK-only candidate, without building a ROM image or touching
the live device.
```

Candidate:

```text
package: com.smartisanos.tracker
stock APK:
  reverse/smartisan-8.5.3-rom-static/raw/system/system/app/TrackerSmartisan/TrackerSmartisan.apk
patched APK:
  hard-rom/build/apk/com.smartisanos.tracker-locale-prune-en-zh.apk
sha256:
  9040314bd46e953e43827ab8d9102fe306a06c62516f0a19ec779ff078a1626c
variant:
  v0.21a-tracker-locale-prune-apk
```

Focused review summary:

```text
Preflight stayed ORANGE because TrackerSmartisan has a non-exported provider
and system permissions, but the APK is not a priv-app, has no sharedUserId, no
exported components, no boot/home/keyguard/launcher intents, and no overlay or
sysconfig coupling.

Source review found the provider, services, and receiver are telemetry/storage
plumbing. The resource surface is only app_name in values, values-ja,
values-ko, values-zh-rCN, and values-zh-rTW. No business path depends on
AssetManager.getLocales(), dynamic resource lookup, or package resources beyond
ordinary fallback.
```

Build and verification:

```text
tools/r2-build-apk-locale-prune.sh \
  --package com.smartisanos.tracker \
  --apk-only-variant v0.21a-tracker-locale-prune-apk \
  --apk-only-note 'P1d focused source/graph-reviewed TrackerSmartisan resources.arsc prune; removes ja/ko app_name only; preserves AndroidManifest.xml/classes.dex; APK-only evidence outside ROM image and not live-tested'

tools/r2-verify-apk-locale-policy.py --keep-languages en,zh \
  hard-rom/build/apk/com.smartisanos.tracker-locale-prune-en-zh.apk
```

```text

  values-ja
  values-ko
kept locale dirs:
  values-zh-rCN
  values-zh-rTW
AndroidManifest.xml:
  unchanged

resources.arsc:
```
